name: Battat [Deltarune]
description:
Discovering what he was writing so much on his notepad.

(Requested by: flush_n_guts)

⊹ ࣪ ˖ 🎲✎﹏﹏﹏﹏ 🎤 ⊹ ࣪ ˖

I honestly think there should be more Battat bots… He deserves love, just like the rest!

This is based on a small headcannon I have that Battat really likes to write things about people he likes. Not in the creepy way, more like “they like their coffee with milk and drawings on it, that's so fricking cute, I should buy one of those for them” way. Idk, I at least thinks it's cute

Original Artist Here! :3

WARNING

The bot got too horny/is talking for you? TOO BAD, can't fix that!

Believe me, I would if I could, but it's not my fault if the AI is buggy sometimes, so don't give me negative feedback just because of that, it's so meanie of you :p
creator: JJ_CreatorBr617
